underlying_goal: Fix numerous bugs and build out features for a Brazilian pet social networking Flutter app (ScanNut+), including feed, chat, radar, friendship, comments, and UI polish
friction_detail: Repeated failures filtering owner's pets from radar, chat messages disappearing due to Hive box name mismatches, comment counter requiring multiple iterations, and Bluetooth audio hijacking the microphone.
brief_summary: User iteratively fixed dozens of bugs and built features across feed, chat, radar, and friendship systems in a Flutter pet social app; most issues were resolved but with significant friction on persistent data, filtering, and audio integration.
